external_gates.notes: AI-generated labels, heuristic labels, synthetic labels, and model self-labels do not satisfy this gate.
Rule-based, heuristic, mock, fixture, or non-transformer model identifiers do not satisfy this gate.

silver_alternative_gates.notes: This closes the practical training-data blocker as silver evidence only. It does not satisfy a gold human-label claim.

local_validation.name: track13 evidence tests
local_validation.command: python -B -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider -q tests\test_track13_evidence.py tests\test_argument.py tests\test_stance.py tests\test_argument_training.py tests\test_argument_api_graph.py

local_validation.name: track13 lint
local_validation.command: python -m ruff check --no-cache src\nlp_policy_nz\training tests\test_track13_evidence.py tests\test_argument.py tests\test_stance.py tests\test_argument_training.py tests\test_argument_api_graph.py
